news.title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 finally revealed, and it's officially leaving last-generation consoles behind
news.titleEN: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 finally revealed, and it's officially leaving last-generation consoles behind
news.desc: Activision and Infinity Ward have revealed Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4. It's launching on Xbox Series X/S, PS5, PC, and Nintendo Switch 2 on the 23rd October, 2026. Read more
news.descEN: Activision and Infinity Ward have revealed Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4. It's launching on Xbox Series X/S, PS5, PC, and Nintendo Switch 2 on the 23rd October, 2026. Read more

news.title: Call of Duty is in need of a big win, and Modern Warfare 4's multiplayer might be it
news.titleEN: Call of Duty is in need of a big win, and Modern Warfare 4's multiplayer might be it
news.desc: Call of Duty is in desperate need of a win. Black Ops 7 was the climax of rising displeasure in the established formula. It lacked that bite, amongst other things. It missed the mark for many, especially compared to older entries. Read more
news.descEN: Call of Duty is in desperate need of a win. Black Ops 7 was the climax of rising displeasure in the established formula. It lacked that bite, amongst other things. It missed the mark for many, especially compared to older entries. Read more

news.title: "We make an entertainment product" - Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 leads on their sure to be controversial North vs South Korea campaign
news.titleEN: "We make an entertainment product" - Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 leads on their sure to be controversial North vs South Korea campaign
news.desc: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 is taking the series to South Korea. The campaign starts with North Korean missiles reigning down on a densely packed urban environment, and puts you in the shoes of soldiers in the midst of this chaos. Read more
news.descEN: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 is taking the series to South Korea. The campaign starts with North Korean missiles reigning down on a densely packed urban environment, and puts you in the shoes of soldiers in the midst of this chaos. Read more

news.title: Bungie details Marathon Season 2 and the new Sentinel class, with a free-to-play week and special sale planned, too
